    org.web3j.ens.EnsResolver.obtainPublicResolver(String)

    Use EnsResolver.obtainOffchainResolver(String) instead.

    org.web3j.protocol.core.methods.response.EthCall.reverts()
    org.web3j.tx.Contract.deploy(Class<T>, Web3j, Credentials, BigInteger, BigInteger, String, String, BigInteger)
    org.web3j.tx.Contract.deploy(Class<T>, Web3j, TransactionManager, BigInteger, BigInteger, String, String, BigInteger)
    org.web3j.tx.Contract.getGasPrice()
    use ContractGasProvider
    org.web3j.tx.Contract.setGasPrice(BigInteger)
    use ContractGasProvider
